title: AVERT Trail Entry
description: One entry in the AVERT Trail: an append-only, hash-chained record of an action. Kept consistent with the Apier reference implementation's live audit-log entry — `id` and `action` are strings and `occurred_at` is an RFC 3339 timestamp. The hash chain makes the trail tamper-evident: each entry commits to the previous entry's hash.

id.description: Unique identifier for this trail entry.

actor.description: Identifier of the party that performed the action.

action.description: Machine-readable identifier of the action performed.

resource.description: The resource or entity the action was performed against.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical form of this entry, binding its contents.

previous_hash.description: Hash of the previous entry in the chain, or null for the first entry. Links entries into a tamper-evident chain.

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the action occurred.
